'''Cyax''' was the [[Cyax system/Legends|Cyax system's]] primary [[Star/Legends|star]]. It was the brightest star in the skies of [[Varl/Legends|Varl]], and early in the history of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], they created legends about it and its [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. When the Hutts began their expansion from Varl, they left the Cyax system alone, preferring to allow their myths to remain unchallenged.

{{Star-stub}}
